column1: # Fracture Knight — new cards (staging). Comment lines begin with #.
# Existing L1 count: 6 (basic_attack, between_strike, phantom_charge, fracture_apply, phantom_strike, between_burst).
# Adding 6 new L1 cores to reach 12.
# L1 CORE (combat / defense / control / mobility / utility / reaction / passive)

column3: Split the air along a hairline crack. Your next strike this turn ignores cover and partial concealment.
Slide one foot into the Between. Gain a reaction window against the next attack that targets you this round; the attacker rolls with disadvantage.
Draw a fault-line across your stance. Until your next turn, the first melee hit against you shatters harmlessly and grants you a Phantom Charge.
Grip a target's Fracture stacks and pull. Transfer one Fracture stack from this target to an adjacent enemy, then add one stack to both.
An afterimage peels away and walks where you intended to. Move your speed; the echo remains for one round and enemies may target it instead of you.
Press your ear to the broken air. Reveal all Fracture stacks, resonance auras, and hidden enemies within medium range until end of turn.
Level-Up: You no longer close the crack behind you. Gain a permanent Phantom Charge cap increase and begin each combat with one charge.
Level-Up: You have learned to read the grain of a break. When you apply Fracture, you may choose which resonance vein it settles into, gaining a minor rider of your choice.

column1: # Fracture reclaimed; the knight wears the break like armor.

column3: The fracture running through your arm catches the blow first. Reaction: when hit in melee, reduce damage and reflect a thin blade of resonance back.
Pull a Fracture stack off an enemy and graft it onto yourself. Gain temporary armor and a FRAME bonus until end of next turn.
Your blade hums with a fracture that used to be a wound. Your next attack this turn gains +1 die and applies Fracture on hit.
Every scar remembers. When you kill an enemy bearing Fracture, heal equal to their remaining stacks and gain one Phantom Charge.

column1: # The voices of fallen knights ride with this character.

column3: Summon two phantom knights from your memory to flank an enemy. They impose disadvantage on its next attack and fade at turn end.
A slain knight murmurs the next stroke to you. Gain advantage on your next RESONANCE check or attack; if you miss, the whisper keeps for one round.
The old line forms around you. Until your next turn, adjacent allies gain cover from phantom shields and you may redirect one hit aimed at them.
Speak a fallen knight's name aloud. Gain their specialty for one turn: choose a combat rider from the legion's list (guard, strike, or vigil).

column1: # Hold the fracture open; make it a weapon.

column3: Slam your blade into the ground and hold the break wide. Create a Fracture zone at your space; enemies entering take damage and gain a stack.
You refuse to move while the crack is open. Until start of your next turn, you cannot be forced-moved and adjacent enemies suffer -1 to attacks.
Chain an enemy to a Fracture zone you created. They cannot leave the zone until they spend an action to tear free, taking damage if they do.
Passive: while you stand in a Fracture zone you created, you gain bonus armor and regenerate one Phantom Charge at the start of each of your turns.

column1: # L5 POWER CARDS (2 new; plus existing phantom_army = 3 total)

column3: Power: tear a visible rift between here and the Between. For three rounds, any enemy crossing the line takes heavy damage and gains two Fracture stacks.
Power: a charge of ghost cavalry thunders through the battlefield in a line. Every enemy struck is knocked prone and takes resonance damage; allies in the line gain a Phantom Charge.

column1: # L9 SUBCLASS POWER — The Claimed (2 cards)

column3: Subclass Power: break every scar at once. For three rounds, any damage you take is converted half to a Phantom Charge and half to a Fracture stack on the attacker.
Subclass Power: pull every Fracture stack in sight into your blade. Your next attack this turn strikes each affected target simultaneously with that target's own damage echo.

column1: # L9 SUBCLASS POWER — Haunted Legion (2 cards)

column3: Subclass Power: call the entire fallen legion for one ride. A phalanx of phantom knights charges a wide line; all enemies struck are knocked back and Shaken for two rounds.
Subclass Power: name seven fallen knights. For each name, choose an effect from the legion list to resolve in turn order this round. Once spoken, a name cannot be called again for the mission.

column1: # L9 SUBCLASS POWER — The Anchor (2 cards)

column3: Subclass Power: drive your blade into the Between itself and refuse to let it close. Create a massive Fracture zone lasting five rounds; you cannot leave it, and any enemy inside is slowed and bleeds Fracture.

Subclass Power: become the hinge of a wound that will not close. You are immovable for three rounds and every enemy that attacks you gains a Fracture stack; at the end, detonate all stacks you have inflicted.

column1: # L20 CAPSTONE — already have between_the_final_blow; target met, no new capstone.
